name: @qingfeng346/sbot
description: Self-hosted AI agent server. Open-source alternative to OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini interfaces. Run LLM agents locally with MCP tool support, memory, multi-channel integrations (Lark/Feishu), and a built-in web UI.
releasenoteEn:
This release includes the following main changes since 0.2.3:

### Added

1. Added completion events for web chat tool approvals and ask prompts, so the client can close pending action panels as soon as they finish.

### Improved

1. Moved tool approval and ask panels into the input area, keeping pending actions close to the reply box and leaving the message timeline cleaner.

### Fixed

1. Fixed stale tool approval and ask panels remaining in web chat after the approval or question had already been completed.
releasenoteZh:
本次主要更新如下，自 0.2.3 之后：

### 新增

1. Web 聊天事件新增工具审批完成、提问完成通知，前端可以在操作结束后立即收起待处理面板。

### 优化

1. 工具审批和提问面板移动到输入区上方，待处理操作更靠近回复区域，消息列表也更清爽。

### 修复

1. 修复 Web 聊天中工具审批或提问完成后，待审批/待回答面板仍然残留的问题。

scripts.debug: rimraf debug && tsc -p tsconfig.debug.json && node scripts/postbuild.js debug
